characters.name: Andy Pumpkin
characters.description: Andy PumpkinNameAndy PumpkinSpeciesPumpkinGenderMaleSpeaking voiceEddie DeezenFirst appearance"Chasing the Ice Cream Truck"Andy Pumpkinis a minor character inOswald. Andy Pumpkin is a humanoid jack-o'-lantern and the good-natured owner of the local candy shop. He is the best friend ofSteve Tree. Characters similar to Andy are shown working as a garbage collector in "The Polka Dot Umbrella" and as an aquarium employee in "Flippy the Fish." He is also used as a background character often, in episodes such as "Chasing the Ice Cream Truck" (where a pumpkin and a clone appear at the beginning of the episode). However, it is possible that one of them is Andy and the clone is just a Big City resident. In episodes likeThe Sand Sculpture ContestandThe Pet Show,Roderick Robotjoins in to hang out with him and his friend Steve Tree. Andy is mostly a light orange color. His arms and legs are green. Andy's standard outfit consists of an indigo button-up coat, a red bow tie, dark blue pants and gray shoes.

characters.name: Big City Residents
characters.description: Big City ResidentsNamesUnknownSpeciesVariousGendersMale and FemaleSpeaking voicesDebi DerryberryFirst appearance"I Guess You Never Know"TheBig City Residentsare minor characters inOswald. The residents are various citizens ofBig City, often seen in the backgrounds of episodes. The majority of the residents are unnamed. The residents' looks differ greatly from one another. Most of them are anthropomorphic creatures. Notable residents who are never given names include an unidentified green insect, a tall robot (not to be confused withRoderick), and humanoid pumpkins whose designs are similar to that ofAndy.

characters.name: Bingette Bunny
characters.description: Bingette BunnyNameBingette BunnySpeciesRabbitGenderFemaleSpeaking voiceKathy NajimyFirst appearance"The Birdhouse"Bingette Bunnyis a minor character inOswaldandBingo's counterpart. Bingette is the owner of a gardening store. She sells various items, such as tomato plants, watermelons and carrots which she grew herself. Bingette can be a bit ditzy and scatter-brained at times. Bingette's fur is gray, and her eyes are blue. She has a pink nose, long ears and red orange hair. She is normally seen wearing a green apron with her name tag on it.

characters.name: Bingo Bunny
characters.description: Not to be confused withMaestro Bingo Bunny. Bingo BunnyNameBingoSpeciesRabbitGenderMaleSpeaking voiceMac Davis†First appearance"Chasing the Ice Cream Truck"Bingo Bunnyis a minor character inOswaldandBingette's counterpart. Bingo is a normally quiet rabbit who runs various stores in Big City. He was originally intended to be an entirely silent character, yet speaks in the episodes "Henry Needs a Haircut" and "The Naughty Cat," in which he adds necessary dialogue. In all other appearances, he does not speak.

characters.name: Bingo Bunny

characters.name: Birds
characters.description: BirdsNamesUnknownSpeciesSongbirdsGendersMale and FemaleSpeaking VoicesNoneFirst Appearance"Rollerskating"TheBirdsare minor characters inOswald. The birds are residents of theBig City, seen in the backgrounds of nearly every episode. The majority of the birds are primary colors (red, blue or yellow). They do not speak, and normally do not play prominent roles (though "The Birdhouse" focuses onOswaldbuilding a house for them). The birds all have similar shapes. They have circular heads, black eyes and orange beaks. The birds are either red, blue or yellow. They do not appear to have feet.

characters.name: Buster
characters.description: Busteris a minor character inOswald. Buster is a turtle that lives in the same apartment complex asOswald. He is slow, typical for a turtle, and can often be found walking up stairs. Buster is entirely dark green, with the exception of his tan-colored shell and black pupils. He has four legs, a tail, and a small mouth.

characters.name: Catrina
characters.description: CatrinaSpeciesCaterpillarGenderFemaleRelated toMadame Butterfly(mother)Voiced byDebi DerryberryFirst appearance"Rollerskating"Catrinais a recurring character inOswald. Catrina is a baby caterpillar that is just learning how to speak. She is the only child ofMadame Butterfly. Catrina is almost entirely purple. She has two black eyes, three eyelashes on each eye and a black if not red mouth.

characters.name: Catrina
characters.description: CatrinaSpeciesCaterpillarGenderFemaleRelated toMadame Butterfly(mother)Voiced byDebi DerryberryFirst appearance"Rollerskating"Catrinais a recurring character inOswald. She has two black eyes, three eyelashes on each eye and a black if not red mouth.

characters.name: Daisy
characters.description: Daisyis a main character inOswald. Daisy is high-spirited and enthusiastic. She could be described as the polar opposite ofHenry, who would rather stay inside and read the newspaper than go rollerskating. Daisy, however, loves all kinds of sports and outdoor activities. She is always ready for anything, and loves to say, "Golly tamale!" Daisy's face is orange. She has a nose, two black eyes, and a black mouth. Her body is green and she has yellow petals on top of her head.

characters.name: Ducks
characters.description: DucksNamesUnknownSpeciesDucksGendersMale and FemaleSpeaking voicesDebi DerryberryFirst appearance"The Polka Dot Umbrella"Theducksare minor characters inOswald. The ducks are water birds residing in Big City. They are often seen walking in a single-file line (with the ducklings following after their mother). The smallest duckling (whose plumage is noticeably lighter than the other ducks' feathers) becomes a good friend ofDaisyafter following her around for a day. The ducks all have yellow feathers, black eyes, orange beaks and orange feet. The youngest duckling's feathers are a lighter yellow color.

characters.name: Egbert
characters.description: EgbertSpeciesEgg (Humpty Dumpty)GenderMaleRelated toLeo(brother)Voiced byDaran NorrisFirst appearance"Chasing the Ice Cream Truck"Last appearance"Hide and Seek"Egbertis a recurring character inOswald. Egbert is brothers with another egg (Humpty Dumpty) namedLeo. He is considered the "brains" of the two. Egbert and his brother float in and out of the group's activities and provide their own special perspective. Egbert refers to almost every other character as "old boy" (especiallyOswald). Egbert is a cream white color. The majority of his outfits are yellow or blue. Egbert does not normally wear hats, while his brother Leo almost always has one on.

FlippyNameFlippySpeciesFish (Nemo)GenderFemaleSpeaking voiceNoneFirst appearance"Flippy the Fish"Flippyis a minor character inOswald. Flippy is a high-spirited fish.OswaldandWeeniepurchased her from the pet store, but took her to the Big City Aquarium when she became too large to keep as a pet.

The gingerbread people are anthropomorphic gingerbread cookies residing in Big City. They are often seen in the backgrounds of episodes, yet speak on occasion (in episodes such as "I Guess You Never Know" and "The Pet Show").

characters.name: Henry
characters.description: HenrySpeciesPenguinGenderMaleRelated toLouie(cousin)Aunt Arctica (aunt)BornJanuary 8Voiced byDavid LanderFirst appearance"Rollerskating"Henryis the tritagonist ofOswald. Oswald's downstairs neighbor and best friend. Henry is a creature of habit in every way and usually shuns the idea of trying different things, though he can sometimes be persuaded otherwise. He does his best to maintain a strict schedule, which includes taking care of his extensive spoon collection, ending every evening watching "Penguin Patrol", his favorite TV show, and doing the Penguin Polka before bedtime. Most of Henry's favorite foods are fish-flavored and he’s a proven expert on snow. He has an identical cousin from the frozen north namedLouie(voiced by Michael McKean), and on occasion speaks of an Aunt Arctica. His motto is "slow and steady". He always takes two (used to be three) marshmallows in his hot cocoa, saying "No more, no less." He dislikes getting wet. Henry is black and white. He has green eyes His beak and feet are black Henry can best be described as a sarcastic, inconvenienced, yet somewhat level headed penguin, who keeps an introverted, intellectual demeanor alongside his stoic and sassy temper. He's mostly the comic-relief of the show and although constantly being bothered and helped by Oswald, he still thinks of him as his best friend and is never polite to him.

characters.name: Johnny Snowman
characters.description: Johnny SnowmanSpeciesSnowmanGenderMaleVoiced byMel WinklerFirst appearance"Rollerskating"Last appearance"Snow to Go"Johnny Snowmanis a recurring character inOswald. Johnny is a wise yet laid-back snowman who owns the Snow Cone Shop inBig City. Johnny is filled with wisdom and gentle guidance that helps Oswald figure out for himself what's best to do in many situations. Johnny lives in a giant igloo skyscraper. His apartment is filled with maps, curios and books of every kind. He thrives on learning, and loves to quietly impart his wisdom to Oswald and his animal and object friends. Johnny is a respected figure in the Big City community. He’s a good friend ofDaisy. He’s also the coach of the Big City soccer team and he’s also a tap dancer. Johnny is mostly a cream-white color. He has an orange carrot for a nose, three black buttons, two eyes and a black mouth. Johnny also wears a black top hat.

characters.name: Johnny Snowman

He has an orange carrot for a nose, three black buttons, two eyes and a black mouth. Johnny also wears a black top hat.

characters.name: Laverne
characters.description: Laverneis a minor character inOswald. Laverne is an elephant and the only resident of Big City with a similar size to that ofPongo. She loves to eat peanuts from a bag. In "Chasing the Ice Cream Truck", Oswald mistakes Laverne and the sound of her bell for Johnny Snowman's ice cream truck. She angrily walks away after Oswald calls her "a big white elephant". Laverne is the focal point of the episode "Perfect Match," in which she befriendsPongo. Laverne is round and almost entirely white. She has a short tail, a trunk, two black eyes and light pink toenails. She wears a necklace with a gold-colored bell and a pink bow on top of her head.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: LeoSpeciesEgg (Humpty Dumpty)GenderMaleRelated toEgbert(brother)Voiced byGrant AlbrechtFirst appearance"Chasing the Ice Cream Truck"Last appearance"Hide and Seek"Leois a recurring character inOswald. Leo is an anthropomorphic egg (Humpty Dumpty) and the brother of another egg (Humpty Dumpty) namedEgbert. He happily exists in his own blissful little reality, engaging in frivolous activities. Leo is the supportive "right-hand man" to Egbert. Leo's favorite phrase is "Yes, yes!" (which he uses to comment on almost anything). Leo is a cream white color. The majority of his outfits are red. He almost always wears a hat of some kind, while his brother Egbert does not.

characters.name: Leo

He almost always wears a hat of some kind, while his brother Egbert does not.

characters.name: Louie
characters.description: LouieSpeciesPenguinGenderMaleRelated toHenry(cousin)Voiced byMichael McKeanFirst appearance"Odd One Out"Last appearance"Sammy Starfish Live"Louieis a minor character inOswald. Louie acts similarly to his cousin. In "Odd One Out," Louie and Henry reunite and spend the day bonding with each other. Unfortunately, this leads toOswaldbelieving that Henry has forgotten about him. In "Goodbye Best Friend," Louie asks Henry to come with him to the Arctic, against the wishes of Oswald and the townspeople. Henry eventually chooses not to join Louie, who is last seen on the bus to the Arctic. However, Louie makes a cameo appearance in "Sammy Starfish Live" as an audience member. This conflicts with the events of his previous appearance, as Louie moved back to the Arctic and would not have been in Big City. Louie is black and white. He has an orange beak and two eyes. His flippers are black, and his feet are orange. The only difference between him and his cousin is that Louie wears a red bowtie.

characters.name: Madame Butterfly
characters.description: Madame ButterflySpeciesButterflyGenderFemaleRelated toCatrina(daughter)Voiced byLaraine NewmanFirst appearance"Rollerskating"Last appearance"The Big Balloon Rescue"Madame Butterflyis a recurring character inOswald. Madame Butterfly is a maternal figure with lots of common sense and loving support and one of Oswald's friends. She runs the Big Diner, the central place where the characters convene. She is a loving mother when it comes to raising her daughter,Catrina. Although she can be a little overprotective and sometimes too cautious, she is the one the gang turns to when they need help. Madame Butterfly is mostly purple. She has black eyes, and a black mouth. Her antennas are black, and her wings are orange with brown, purple, and red spots. She has four legs.

characters.name: Maestro Bingo Bunny
characters.description: Not to be confused withBingo Bunny. Maestro Bingo Bunnyis a minor character inOswald. Maestro Bingo is the owner of an instrument shop in Big City. He is the only member of the community who knows how to repair pianos. He is also quite knowledgeable about various instruments that he sells.

characters.name: Oswald
characters.description: This article is about the character. For the television series of the same name, seeOswald (TV series). OswaldNameOswaldSpeciesOctopusGenderMaleSpeaking voiceFred SavageFirst appearance"Rollerskating"Oswaldis the titular protagonist ofOswald. ﻿Oswald is a large, blue octopus who takes residence in an apartment complex located inBig City. He lives there along with many other animals, such asHenrythe penguin and a turtle namedBuster. Oswald will often play the piano while singing to his pet dogWeenie. Oswald is known to say "Oh, my gosh!" on many occasions. He wears a life preserver when he is around water and loves Swizzleberry Swirl ice cream.

characters.name: Pongo
characters.description: This article is about the character. For the episode of a similar name, seePongo the Friendly Dragon. PongoSpeciesDragonGenderMaleVoiced byRichard KindFirst appearance"Down in the Dump"Last appearance"The Stopped Clock"Pongois a minor character inOswald. Despite his intimidatingly large size, Pongo is a kindhearted dragon who is always willing to assist others. Unfortunately, he’s quite clumsy and often accidentally makes matters worse after trying to help.

characters.name: Roderick Robot
characters.description: Roderick Robotis a minor character inOswald. InOswald Makes Music, he hangs out with the tin soldiers likeCactus Petein the cast of characters off the list. In episodes likeThe Sand Sculpture ContestandThe Pet Show, he joins in to hang out with the couple:Andy PumpkinandSteve Tree. In the cast, he hangs out with his named and talkative friend,Cactus Polly. One thing about him is that he likes to clap a lot in the episodes: "I Guess You Never Know", "The Sand Sculpture Contest", and "Sammy Starfish Live". His name isn't mentioned in the episodes, exceptThe Pet ShowandThe Naughty Cat. Roderick Robot is a robotic citizen of Big City. He is almost always used as a background character; Roderick Robot is often seen at the diner or walking down the street, without any lines. However, Roderick Robot plays a prominent role in "The Naughty Cat," in whichOswaldcares for his robotic catTinsel. He doesn't have a speaking voice and communicates through beeps instead despite this, everyone (mostly Oswald) can understand him perfectly. His top opens when consuming food or expressing excitement. Roderick Robot is a cylindrical shape. He is mostly teal and yellow, and his appendages and mouth are silver. He has brown eyes, his hands, face, feet and the light on top of his head are yellow. He also has yellow, blue and orange lights on his chest.

characters.name: Roderick Robot
characters.description: Roderick Robotis a minor character inOswald. InOswald Makes Music, he hangs out with the tin soldiers likeCactus Petein the cast of characters off the list. In episodes likeThe Sand Sculpture ContestandThe Pet Show, he joins in to hang out with the couple:Andy PumpkinandSteve Tree. In the cast, he hangs out with his named and talkative friend,Cactus Polly. One thing about him is that he likes to clap a lot in the episodes: "I Guess You Never Know", "The Sand Sculpture Contest", and "Sammy Starfish Live". His name isn't mentioned in the episodes, exceptThe Pet ShowandThe Naughty Cat. Roderick Robot is a robotic citizen of Big City. He is almost always used as a background character; Roderick Robot is often seen at the diner or walking down the street, without any lines. However, Roderick Robot plays a prominent role in "The Naughty Cat," in whichOswaldcares for his robotic catTinsel. He doesn't have a speaking voice and communicates through beeps instead despite this, everyone (mostly Oswald) can understand him perfectly. His top opens when consuming food or expressing excitement. Roderick Robot is a cylindrical shape. He is mostly teal and yellow, and his appendages and mouth are silver. He has brown eyes, his hands, face, feet and the light on top of his head are yellow. He also has yellow, blue and orange lights on his chest.

characters.name: Sammy Starfish
characters.description: Sammy StarfishNameSammy StarfishSpeciesStarfishGenderMaleSpeaking VoiceTony OrlandoFirst Appearance"I Guess You Never Know"Sammy Starfishis a minor character inOswald. Sammy is a starfish and the star ofOswald's favorite television program. He is seen on Oswald's television in many episodes, and only plays a prominent role in the episodes "Sammy Starfish Live" in which he sings alone and Oswald plays piano onstage with the purple squid drummer and "The Pet Show" in which he hosts a pet talent competition. Sammy Starfish is mostly a yellow color. He wears a blue hat and a red bowtie.
